storeListing.title: ZenDownload — Universal Download Manager
storeListing.shortDescription: Fast downloads. Torrent streaming. Videos from 1,462+ sites. Beautiful native UI.
storeListing.fullDescription:
ZenDownload is a fast, modern download manager that handles HTTP, BitTorrent, magnet links, music downloads, and video extraction from 1,462+ sites — all in one beautiful native app.

Whether you are grabbing a single file, streaming a torrent while it downloads, or pulling music from YouTube and SoundCloud with full metadata, ZenDownload gets out of your way.

★ DOWNLOAD ENGINE
• Multi-threaded HTTP with up to 8 parallel connections per file
• BitTorrent with DHT, PEX, magnet resolution, and sequential streaming
• Streaming video/audio from 1,462+ sites via yt-dlp — YouTube, Twitter/X, Reddit, TikTok, Instagram, Twitch, Vimeo, SoundCloud, Rumble, Bitchute
• HLS / DASH adaptive streams (.m3u8 / .mpd)
• Smart URL routing: every URL is HEAD-probed to decide direct vs streaming
• Debrid integration: Real-Debrid, AllDebrid, Premiumize
• M3U / IPTV playlist import
• Music downloader with album art and full ID3 metadata

★ QUEUE & AUTOMATION
• Smart queue with configurable concurrency (1–3 simultaneous)
• Batch import: paste a list, auto-detect types
• Watch folders: auto-add new files dropped in a directory
• Scheduler with time-based download windows
• Bandwidth profiles and per-download speed limits
• RSS, RSSHub, and YouTube channel subscriptions
• Clipboard monitor: auto-detect copied URLs with category preview

★ ORGANIZATION
• Category routing: Video, Music, Documents, Compressed, Programs
• File preview: videos, audio, images, text, PDFs
• Complete history with search and statistics

★ INTERFACE
• Native dark UI with 12 accent colors
• Adjustable corner radius (square to fully pill)
• Background density: solid, glass (frosted), transparent
• Compact mode and font-size presets
• Speed test with multi-server benchmark and live graph
• System tray with live badge for active downloads

★ PLUGIN SYSTEM
• Hook-based events: download.start, download.complete, download.error
• Plugin Store with 40+ community plugins
• Discord notifications, Spotify import, qBittorrent sync, IPTV browser, and more

★ PRIVACY
• Everything stays on your device
• No telemetry, no analytics, no tracking
• Cookie import is local; you choose which browser
• No accounts required

★ OPEN SOURCE
MIT licensed. Built with Tauri 2, React 19, Rust, yt-dlp, and librqbit. Contributions welcome.

release.releaseNotes:
Initial public release.

• Multi-protocol download engine (HTTP, BitTorrent, HLS, magnet)
• Streaming from 1,462+ sites via yt-dlp
• Music downloader with full ID3 metadata
• Speed test with live graph
• 40+ installable plugins
• 12 accent colors, dark theme, glass effects
• Debrid integration (Real-Debrid, AllDebrid, Premiumize)
• Clipboard monitor, scheduler, watch folders, RSS subscriptions
